original: Pursuant to a review of your eligibility, this notice serves to inform you that your Food Assistance Program benefit allotment shall be reduced to $245.00 per month, effective April 23, 2026, said reduction being predicated upon a reported change in your household composition. Should you wish to contest this determination, you are entitled to request an administrative hearing within 90 days of the date of this notice.
target: Your food assistance will go down to $245 a month starting April 23, 2026. This is because the number of people in your home changed. If you think this is wrong, you can ask for a hearing within 90 days.

operative_facts.reason: a reported change in your household composition

original: This correspondence constitutes formal notification that your application for Food Assistance Program benefits has been denied, said denial being predicated upon a reported change in your household composition. You are hereby advised of your right to request an administrative hearing within 90 days of the date of this notice.
target: We can't approve your food assistance application. This is because the number of people in your home changed. If you disagree, you can ask for a hearing within 90 days.

operative_facts.reason: a reported change in your household composition

original: In order to continue processing your case, you must furnish verification of the members of your household no later than November 9, 2026. Failure to provide the requested documentation by said date may result in denial or closure of your case.
target: We need proof of who lives with you to keep your case open. Please send it by November 9, 2026. If we do not get it, your benefits could stop.

original: Pursuant to a review of your eligibility, this notice serves to inform you that your Food Assistance Program benefit allotment shall be reduced to $421.00 per month, effective January 9, 2026, said reduction being predicated upon a failure to provide requested verification within the prescribed period. Should you wish to contest this determination, you are entitled to request an administrative hearing within 90 days of the date of this notice.
target: Your food assistance will go down to $421 a month starting January 9, 2026. This is because we did not get the documents we asked for. If you think this is wrong, you can ask for a hearing within 90 days.

operative_facts.reason: a failure to provide requested verification within the prescribed period

original: Be advised that the certification period governing your receipt of Food Assistance Program benefits is set to expire. You are required to complete the redetermination process on or before November 24, 2026 in order to avoid an interruption in your benefits.
target: Your food assistance is ending soon because your benefit period is ending. To keep getting it, finish your renewal by November 24, 2026.

original: Be advised that the certification period governing your receipt of Food Assistance Program benefits is set to expire. You are required to complete the redetermination process on or before June 15, 2026 in order to avoid an interruption in your benefits.
target: Your food assistance is ending soon because your benefit period is ending. To keep getting it, finish your renewal by June 15, 2026.

target: We need proof of where you live to keep your case open. Please send it by July 22, 2026. If we do not get it, your benefits could stop.
